pokemon:snorlax.name: Snorlax
pokemon:snorlax.summary: Snorlax’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: Snorlax’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.
When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.
When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.
Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
This POKéMON's stomach is so strong, even eating moldy or rotten food will not affect it.
Its stomach can digest any kind of food, even if it happens to be moldy or rotten.
SNORLAX’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile POKéMON that there are children who use its big belly as a place to play.
It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.
What sounds like its cry may ac­ tually be its snores or the rumblings of its hungry belly.
What sounds like its cry may actually be its snores or the rumblings of its hungry belly.
Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
This glutton appears in villages without warning and devours the entirety of their rice granaries—such occurrences have long been counted among the gravest of disasters.
Will eat anything, even if the food happens to be a little moldy. It never gets an upset stomach.
Will eat anything, even if the food happens to be a little moldy. It never gets an upset stomach.
It eats nearly 900 pounds of food every day. It starts nodding off while eating—and continues to eat even while it’s asleep.
Snorlax’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.
It stops eating only to sleep. It doesn’t feel full unless it eats nearly 900 pounds a day.
When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.
Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.
SNORLAX’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile POKéMON that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.
SNORLAX’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile POKéMON that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.
This Pokémon’s stomach is so strong, even eating moldy or rotten food will not affect it.
Its stomach's di­ gestive juices can dissolve any kind of poison. It can even eat things off the ground.
Its stomach’s digestive juices can dissolve any kind of poison. It can even eat things off the ground.
Its stomach is said to be incomparably strong. Even Muk’s poison is nothing more than a hint of spice on Snorlax’s tongue.
It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.
It has no interest in anything other than eating. Even if you climb up on its stomach while it’s napping, it doesn’t seem to mind at all!
It doesn’t do anything other than eat and sleep. When prompted to make a serious effort, though, it apparently displays awesome power.
When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.
When its belly is full, it becomes too lethargic to even lift a finger, so it is safe to bounce on its belly.
It is not satisfied unless it eats over 880 pounds of food every day. When it is done eating, it goes promptly to sleep.
Its stomach can digest any kind of food, even if it happens to be moldy or rotten.
Will eat anything, even if the food happens to be a little moldy. It never gets an upset stomach.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: Snorlax’s typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that there are children who use its expansive belly as a place to play.

pokemon:munchlax.name: Munchlax
pokemon:munchlax.summary: It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.
In its desperation to gulp down food, it forgets about the food it has hidden under its fur.
In its desperation to gulp down food, it forgets about the food it has hidden under its fur.
It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.
It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.
Its robust stomach allows it to nonchalantly devour even rotted matter. It pays frequent visits to villages, seeking out food scraps intended for compost.
When it finds something that looks like it might be edible, it goes right ahead and swallows it whole. That’s why it gets fatter day by day.
It hides food under its long body hair. However, it forgets it has hidden the food.
It hides food under its long body hair. However, it forgets it has hidden the food.
In its desperation to gulp down food, it forgets about the food it has hidden under its fur.
It stores food beneath its fur. It might share just one bite, but only if it really trusts you.
It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.
It needs to consume its own weight in food every day. As far as flavor is concerned, it’s indifferent.
Stuffing itself with vast amounts of food is its only concern. Whether the food is rotten or fresh, yummy or tasteless—it does not care.
Anything that looks edible, Munchlax will go on and swallow whole. Its stomach is tough enough to handle it even if the food has gone rotten.
It hides food under its long fur, but it sometimes forgets about it and causes a stinky disturbance.
In its desperation to gulp down food, it forgets about the food it has hidden under its fur.
In its desperation to gulp down food, it forgets about the food it has hidden under its fur.
It hides food under its long body hair. However, it forgets it has hidden the food.
It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: It conceals food under the long fur on its body. It carts around this food stash and swallows it without chewing.
